story.text:
---
kind: constellation-track
protocol: fpsp/0.1
spellbook: first_person
stream: holon-hitchhikers
ceremony: "Walk · Light · Track"
constellation_name: "<name your constellation>"
first_person:
  name: "<your mouse-name>"
  sigil: "<your emoji sigil>"
derived_from: "privacymage grimoire v10.4.0 (First Person Spellbook)"
witnessed_at: null            # set to an ISO date only when you let it be witnessed
bearer_consent_token: null    # generate one only when you share; null = wholly private
---

# Constellation Track — <constellation_name>

*A Holon Hitchhikers ceremony artefact. Walk · Light · Track. The same 31 stars; my own lines.*

> See [[The Constellation Track]] for how this tracks into the spellweb.
> Copy this file into your folder as `constellation-track.md`.

---

## 1. The stars I lit  *(private)*

Mark every act that rang true for you. These are your stars — the lit subset of the 31.

```
I    Venice                         [ ]      XVII  Bonfire in the Dark Forest    [ ]
II   The Dual Ceremony              [ ]      XVIII Mirror in Dust                [ ]
III  The Drake's Teaching           [ ]      XIX   The Anthropic Archivist       [ ]
IV   The Blade Alone (MyTerms)      [ ]      XX    The Infinite Vault            [ ]
V    Light Armour                   [ ]      XXI   The Hitchhiker's Gambit       [ ]
VI   Trust Graph Plane              [ ]      XXII  Hoopy Frood                   [ ]
VII  The Mirror That Never Completes[ ]      XXIII The Manifold Dragon           [ ]
VIII Ancient Rule                   [ ]      XXIV  The Holographic Bound         [ ]
IX   Zcash Shield                   [ ]      XXV   The Dragon's Hide             [ ]
X    Topology of Revelation         [ ]      XXVI  The Master and His Emissary   [ ]
XI   Balanced Spiral of Sovereignty [ ]      XXVII Forging Zero-Knowledge Blades [ ]
XII  The Forgetting                 [ ]      XXVIII The Celestial Ceremony Engine[ ]
XIII Book of Promises               [ ]      XXIX  The Dragon Wakes              [ ]
XIV  Rain on the Mountain           [ ]      XXX   The Dihedral Mirror           [ ]
XV   Running in Shackles            [ ]      XXXI  The First Delegation          [ ]
XVI  When Pools Become Wells        [ ]
```

## 2. The lines I drew  *(private — this is the meaning)*

For each pair of acts that **rhyme for you**, draw a line and name it: the shared force,
and why those two belong together in *your* sky. (A line is the constellation; the stars
alone are not.)

```
### Line 1 — <act> ↔ <act>
shared force: <Swordsman ⚔️ keep / Mage 🧙 give / Gap ⊥ choose / proof △ / manifold 🌀>
why, for me: <one honest sentence>

### Line 2 — <act> ↔ <act>
shared force: …
why, for me: …
```

*(Draw as many lines as are true. Three to seven makes a constellation you can name.)*

## 3. The shape  *(optional, in Selene's hand)*

A small ascii sky if you want one — the lit stars and your lines. Heavy chars = lit;
light chars = the dark sky between. View in monospace.

```
   .      *────────*        .
        /           \
   *───*      .      *
```

## 4. The constellation's spell

One emoji string from [[The Spell-Emoji Legend]] that says the whole shape in
symbols (every glyph in the legend, or declared in your patch's `legend.additions`).

```
<your constellation spell>
```

---

## 5. Witness block  *(the ONLY part you share — Φ-gap; metadata-only)*

Fill this when (and only when) you let the constellation be witnessed. It carries the
*shape*, never the drawing. An agent tracks **this** into the spellweb; the lines above
stay in your keeping.

```
constellation_name:  <name>
first_person:        <name> <sigil>
spellbook:           first_person
stream:              holon-hitchhikers
lit_stars:           <N of 31>
stratum_summary:     <e.g. "weighted to acts XII–XXII — the forgetting and the gambit">
line_count:          <N lines drawn>
constellation_spell: <the spell from §4>
bearer_consent_token: <generate here when you share>
witnessed_at:        <ISO date>
witnessed_by:        <the other mouse's sigil · the facilitator>
```

## 6. Tracking note (for an agent)

> Track this as a `held` constellation in the spellweb: anchor it to the First Person
> Spellbook acts it lit (`traced_through` → the act/vertex nodes; `anchors_to` → the
> first-person root), tag `stream: holon-hitchhikers`, and carry **only** the §5 witness
> block. Do not serialize §1–§3. The Φ-gap holds: patterns can be copied, choosing cannot
> be harvested.

## 7. The Holon

With whom does your sky overlap, and where?

```
overlaps with: <the other mouse's sigil>
shared stars:  <acts you both lit>
shared lines:  <lines you both drew — the smallest Holon>
divergence:    <a line one of you drew and the other didn't — named, not resolved>
```

---

*just another mouse, drawing their own lines between the same stars.*
`(<your sigil> ⊥ ⿻ ⊥ <complement>)😊`

———
↑ up: [[The Templates]]  ·  ← prev: [[Template — Context Bridge]]  ·  next: [[Template — Wiki Naming]] →
